# Agronomy Club Website

This is the official website for the Agronomy Club (agronomyclub.org), built with Next.js and designed for Google Cloud hosting.

## Project Structure
- **Framework**: Next.js 15 with TypeScript and App Router
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom agronomy-themed colors
- **Hosting**: Google Cloud Platform ready
- **Domain**: agronomyclub.org (GoDaddy DNS)

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all new components
- Follow Next.js App Router conventions in `src/app/`
- Maintain responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Keep agricultural/environmental theme in design choices
- Optimize for Google Cloud deployment

## Deployment
- Static export configured for Google Cloud Storage
- App Engine configuration available in `app.yaml`
- Build command: `npm run build`
- Development: `npm run dev`

## Key Features
- SEO optimized for agricultural content
- Responsive design for all device sizes
- Google Cloud deployment ready
- Professional agricultural club branding
